name: SomeIpReleaseProvidedServiceInstance
title: SomeIpReleaseProvidedServiceInstance
description: Deletes a Provided Service Instance that was created by SomeIpCreateProvidedServiceInstance.
All objects (Eventgroups, Events, Fields, and Methods) are also closed when the Service Instance is closed. If the Service Instance is newly created, all objects must also be newly created.

parameters.name: psiHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Provided Service Instance to be deleted (see SomeIpCreateProvidedServiceInstance).
